title: FullDocumentProvenanceTraceOutput
description: Output schema for Use Case 2: Full-Document Provenance Trace. Returns either a flat JSON array of all records from document D (group_by=none) or a grouped JSON object.

flat_array.description: Present when group_by='none'. JSON array of all index records from document D, ordered by page_anchor ascending. Each record includes provenance chain fields.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source document content.

chunk_id.description: Chunk identifier from P90 chunk manifest.

model_lane.description: Worker model lane that produced this record.

audit_status.description: Current audit status from P94 promoted index.

grouped_by_audit_status.description: Present when group_by='audit_status'. JSON object with audit status values as keys, each containing the filtered record array.

grouped_by_model_lane.description: Present when group_by='model_lane'. JSON object with model lane values as keys, each containing the filtered record array.

metadata.description: Summary metadata about the query result.
